title: Workflow Share!

posts.author: JasHam (Jasmine Hammond)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Everyone!

It’s been a little while since we’ve dived into how our community is using monday and with all the updates, I think a lot of us are interested in learning!

So many of you are using monday.com in ways like fundraising, donor management, or project management. There are people from hundreds of different types of nonprofits here tracking their work in similar boards and workflows. These might be relevant for other community members to know and understand! This is one of my favorite parts of this community—giving you more ideas for how to get more from the platform!

Share your use case here. We also love screenshots and videos of your boards work! This is all in hopes to help other people learn from you!

If you’re looking for a specific use case or workflow and you’re not sure where to start, why not ask other users for their help here?
